mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_DOCUMENT_MASTER ( DOC_ID, DRAFT_TIME, DRAFTER_DEPT, APPROVAL_FORM_ID, SECURITY_LEVEL, PRESERVE_YEAR, ROOT_DOC_ID, VERSION, DRAFTER_ID, DRAFTER_NAME, APPROVAL_FORM_TITLE ) VALUES ( #{docId}, NOW(), #{drafterDept}, #{approvalFormId}, #{securityLevel}, #{preserveYear}, #{rootDocId}, #{version}, #{drafterId}, #{drafterName}, #{approvalFormTitle} )

INSERT INTO TBL_ACTIVEDOC ( DOC_ID, ATTACH_YN, URGENT_YN, LAST_MOD_DATE, DOC_TITLE, SEARCH_CONTENT, FILE_PATH, FILE_NAME, CONTENT_TYPE ) VALUES ( #{docId}, #{attachYn}, #{urgentYn}, NOW(), #{docTitle}, #{docContent}, #{filePath}, #{fileName}, #{contentType} )

INSERT INTO TBL_STATUS_MAP ( DOC_ID, DOC_STATUS, CURR_STEP, CURR_APPROVER, UPDATE_DATE, DOC_TITLE, DRAFTER, DRAFTER_DEPT, CURR_APPROVER_NAME, CURR_APPROVER_DEPT ) VALUES ( #{dto.docId}, #{docStatus}, #{next.stepSeq}, #{next.approverId}, NOW(), #{dto.docTitle}, #{dto.drafterId}, #{dto.drafterDept}, #{next.approverName}, #{next.approverDept} )

INSERT INTO TBL_APRLINE ( STEP_SEQ, DOC_ID, APPROVER_ID, APPROVER_NAME, APPROVER_JOB, APPROVE_TYPE, APPROVE_STATUS, APPROVE_REASON, APPROVE_DATE ) VALUES
( #{item.stepSeq}, #{docId}, #{item.approverId}, #{item.approverName}, #{item.approverJob}, #{item.approveType},
'02' '01' , NULL,
NOW() NULL
)
